meta.note: Sitio de muestra ficticio — exhibición pública.

business.name: Vanta Auto Detailing
business.headline: Restore OEM Clarity With Multi-Stage Correction & 9H Ceramic Shield
business.tagline: Our certified technicians eliminate micro-marring and apply bonded ceramic shields backed by a 7-year warranty.
business.emotional_core: Quiet pride in a car that looks brand new again

services.name: Full Interior Detail
services.desc: Deep extraction of seats, carpets and trim — the inside feels new, not just wiped.

services.name: Paint Correction & Ceramic
services.desc: Swirl and scratch correction with a long-lasting ceramic coat that beads water for years.

services.name: Exterior Wash & Gloss
services.desc: Hand wash, decontamination and a glossy sealant that holds up to Florida sun.

highlights: We inspect and quote before we touch your car — no surprise upsells.
Mobile: we come to your home or office across Greater Orlando.
Ceramic and correction work backed by a written warranty.

photos.alt: That shine after a fresh detail!
Bringing interiors back to life, one seat at a time.
Ready for the road ahead with a pristine finish.
That shine after a fresh detail!

reviews.name: Marcus Trent
reviews.text: Brought my truck in covered in swirl marks. Picked it up looking better than the day I bought it. These guys are the real deal.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: They came to my office and detailed my SUV in the parking lot. Inside looked brand new — no more dog hair anywhere. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Dewayne K.
reviews.text: Honest quote up front, no pressure to add stuff I didn’t need. The ceramic coat still beads water months later.

reviews.name: Hannah R.
reviews.text: My black sedan finally looks black again instead of dusty gray. The reflection is unreal. Already booked my next one.

reviews.name: Owner — Vanta
reviews.text: Thank you all — every car gets treated like it’s our own. See you next time.

events.title: Summer Ceramic Special
events.description: 20% off ceramic coating packages booked this month.

review_form.note: Captura de reseña first-party — los envíos entran a una cola y se moderan antes de publicar.
